Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 190 

PRVDR_FULL_CCN_NUM 

LABEL: Provider Full CMS Certification Number (CCN) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the extended CMS Certification Number (CCN). 

This extended field is designed to allow for the identification of multiple campus hospitals. For multi-
campus hospitals, all campuses contain the same first 6-digit CCN (reference PRVDR_BASE_FAC_NUM 
variable in this data file), but positions
